pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-009 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.405 composite (highest: NICE at 0.405). Scope is edge_case for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Quality, composite 0.405. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in ~45% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer postings as a secondary competency. Data quality for regulatory submissions and clinical evidence packages. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data Quality without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
